title: hemierium graecum
intro: Hemierium graecum, also known as Silybum marianum, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly known as the milk thistle, a plant recognized for its unique ability to regenerate its leaves after being damaged by herbivores. The medicinal properties of Hemierium graecum lie in its seeds, which are rich in silymarin, a flavonoid compound that has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is used to treat liver and gallbladder disorders, and its herbal preparations, such as capsules or tea, have been shown to provide health benefits, including protecting the liver from damage and promoting detoxification.
